description: Unified ITSM operational analytics across ServiceNow, Jira Service Management, and BMC Remedy (HPD Help Desk), normalized onto common business services and CI dimensions.

raw_schemas.table_ddl:
-- ServiceNow Incident table (incident)
CREATE TABLE sn_incident (
  sys_id STRING NOT NULL,
  number STRING,
  short_description STRING,
  description STRING,
  category STRING,
  subcategory STRING,
  priority STRING,
  impact STRING,
  urgency STRING,
  state STRING,
  opened_at TIMESTAMP,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP,
  closed_at TIMESTAMP,
  caller_id STRING,
  assignment_group STRING,
  assigned_to STRING,
  u_business_service STRING,
  cmdb_ci STRING,
  company STRING,
  sys_created_on TIMESTAMP,
  sys_updated_on TIMESTAMP,
  sys_created_by STRING,
  sys_updated_by STRING
);

-- ServiceNow task SLA tracking (task_sla)
CREATE TABLE sn_task_sla (
  sys_id STRING NOT NULL,
  task STRING,
  sla STRING,
  start_time TIMESTAMP,
  end_time TIMESTAMP,
  business_percentage NUMERIC,
  elapsed_time_seconds BIGINT,
  pause_duration_seconds BIGINT,
  stage STRING,
  has_breached BOOLEAN,
  sys_created_on TIMESTAMP,
  sys_updated_on TIMESTAMP
);

-- ServiceNow SLA definition (contract_sla)
CREATE TABLE sn_contract_sla (
  sys_id STRING NOT NULL,
  name STRING,
  duration BIGINT,
  type STRING,
  schedule STRING,
  active BOOLEAN,
  stage STRING,
  sys_created_on TIMESTAMP,
  sys_updated_on TIMESTAMP
);

-- ServiceNow CMDB CI (cmdb_ci)
CREATE TABLE sn_cmdb_ci (
  sys_id STRING NOT NULL,
  name STRING,
  sys_class_name STRING,
  install_status STRING,
  u_business_service STRING,
  environment STRING,
  owned_by STRING,
  company STRING,
  location STRING,
  sys_created_on TIMESTAMP,
  sys_updated_on TIMESTAMP
);

-- Jira Service Management issues used as incidents/requests
CREATE TABLE jira_itsm_issue (
  id STRING NOT NULL,
  issue_key STRING,
  project_key STRING,
  issuetype_name STRING,
  summary STRING,
  description STRING,
  priority_name STRING,
  status_name STRING,
  created TIMESTAMP,
  updated TIMESTAMP,
  resolutiondate TIMESTAMP,
  reporter STRING,
  assignee STRING,
  customfield_service STRING,
  customfield_ci STRING,
  customfield_request_type STRING,
  customfield_impact STRING,
  customfield_urgency STRING
);

-- Jira SLAs per issue (export from JSM SLA report)
CREATE TABLE jira_issue_sla (
  issue_id STRING NOT NULL,
  issue_key STRING,
  metric_name STRING,
  goal_minutes INTEGER,
  elapsed_minutes INTEGER,
  breached BOOLEAN,
  start_time TIMESTAMP,
  stop_time TIMESTAMP
);

-- Jira Assets / CMDB objects
CREATE TABLE jira_cmdb_ci (
  object_id STRING NOT NULL,
  object_key STRING,
  object_name STRING,
  object_type STRING,
  environment STRING,
  business_service_key STRING,
  is_critical BOOLEAN,
  owner_team STRING,
  updated TIMESTAMP
);

-- BMC Remedy HPD:Help Desk incidents export
CREATE TABLE bmc_hpd_helpdesk (
  incident_id STRING NOT NULL,
  incident_number STRING,
  submit_date TIMESTAMP,
  last_modified_date TIMESTAMP,
  status STRING,
  priority STRING,
  impact STRING,
  urgency STRING,
  summary STRING,
  detailed_description STRING,
  assigned_group STRING,
  assignee STRING,
  service_ci STRING,
  ci_name STRING,
  customer_company STRING,
  sla_id STRING,
  respond_by TIMESTAMP,
  resolve_by TIMESTAMP,
  closed_date TIMESTAMP
);

-- BMC CMDB CI entities
CREATE TABLE bmc_cmdb_ci (
  ci_id STRING NOT NULL,
  ci_name STRING,
  ci_type STRING,
  environment STRING,
  business_service_name STRING,
  criticality STRING,
  owner_group STRING,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- BMC SLA definitions
CREATE TABLE bmc_sla (
  sla_id STRING NOT NULL,
  sla_name STRING,
  priority STRING,
  target_response_minutes INTEGER,
  target_resolution_minutes INTEGER,
  active BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- Unified business service dimension across systems
CREATE TABLE business_services (
  service_id STRING NOT NULL,
  source_system STRING,
  source_service_key STRING,
  service_name STRING,
  service_tier STRING,
  business_unit STRING,
  env STRING,
  criticality INTEGER,
  owner_group STRING,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

lod_configurations.description: One row per BMC HPD incident
One row per logical business service
One row per Jira CMDB object

user_query: Create a unified ITSM operational dashboard across ServiceNow, Jira, and BMC showing incident/request volume, MTTA, MTTR, SLA performance, backlog aging, and service health by business service and CI.
data_mart_goals: Normalize incident, request, and SLA data from ServiceNow, Jira Service Management, and BMC Remedy onto a common business service dimension.
Provide cross-platform MTTA, MTTR, SLA breach rates, and backlog aging by service, CI, environment, and assignment/owner groups.
Enable 12-month trends and benchmarks across platforms to identify hotspots and improvement opportunities.
metric_questions: What is the combined incident volume across ServiceNow, Jira, and BMC by priority and business service?
How do MTTA and MTTR compare by platform and by assignment group?
Which services have the highest SLA breach rates across all three systems?
What is the backlog of open incidents/issues and their aging buckets by platform?
Which CIs and services are the noisiest across all platforms?
